text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A year has passed since the last summer camp. It's
time to get back to the grindstone so we can
make even greater improvements.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The future is still up in the air, but Hishi Akebono
seems to want to enjoy summer without worrying
too much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our blistering summer camp gets underway with a
promise to watch fireworks together!
